'''Arr'yka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] who served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] during the early stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. As a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], she was assigned to the role of communications officer aboard the ''[[Ralroost]]''. She was killed by an enemy blaster bolt during the [[Battle of Ithor]].

{{Char-stub}}
